untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (HTF confirmation by LTF price action) and pattern recognition with indicator count limiting (max 3). The backtest engine schema does not support: (1) explicit multi-timeframe hierarchy conditions, (2) pattern detection beyond candlestick properties, (3) dynamic indicator count constraints. The source text is also heavily corrupted/truncated, making precise condition extraction impossible.
